fields.title: [transports] Correlate CLI/MCP/HTTP spans with log sessions and journals

[transports] Correlate CLI/MCP/HTTP spans with log sessions and journals
fields.validation_summary: Added representative transport correlation spans to ticket move lifecycle paths across ticket-http, ticket-mcp, and ticket-cli. HTTP move now logs request_id, workspace, ticket_id, mode, blockers, and journal_id on apply; MCP move_preflight/apply/resume/rollback now generate stable tool_request_id values and log journal_id/phase on outcomes; ticket-cli now creates a top-level request correlation span and emits move-mode/journal_id completion logs. Validation passed via cargo check -p ticket-cli -p ticket-http -p ticket-mcp.
